title: Find My Device - Connected / Nearby device details
scenario: Verify "Find My Device" in App Settings displays device name, connection status, description, and Play button for a paired and connected headset
steps: Tap on the paired and connected headset to open Device Settings
Tap on App Settings (or the gear icon)
Observe the new window that appears
expected: A new window is displayed showing: the device name, connection status ("Connected"), a description instructing the user to ensure the device is the main audio source to play a tone, and a Play button.
